title: keybind slots
description: This Mod Adds to ability of saving every keybind for each one is unique like pvp survival and adds them some shortcuts!
body:
Keybind Slots: Professional Profile Management
Keybind Slots is a high-performance utility mod for the Fabric loader designed to give players absolute control over their keybindings. Developed by Ekrem Taha, this mod eliminates the frustration of manually reconfiguring settings for different playstyles. Whether you are a competitive PvP athlete or a technical survivalist, Keybind Slots ensures your controls are always optimized for the task at hand.

The Problem: "Input Lock" in PvP
In high-level Minecraft PvP, specifically during Attribute Swapping or complex combat maneuvers, players often bind attack functions to unconventional keys. While this provides a competitive edge, it often leads to "Input Lock"—where you suddenly realize you cannot break blocks or navigate menus because your keys are remapped for combat.

Keybind Slots solves this by providing a "Safety Net." With a single keystroke, you can toggle between a specialized combat profile and a default survival profile, ensuring you never get stuck in the wrong configuration.

Core Features
10 Customizable Slots: Configure up to 10 independent keybinding profiles. Name them (e.g., "PvP", "Mining", "Bridge", "Default") to stay organized.

Instant Hot-Swapping: Use the global toggle key (Default: O) to cycle through or open the slot manager instantly.

Visual Slot Manager: A clean, intuitive UI built for speed. See exactly which profile is active at a glance.

Performance Optimized: Built on modern Fabric standards, ensuring zero impact on your frame rates. It works perfectly alongside performance mods like Sodium, Iris, and ImmediatelyFast.

Seamless Integration: Fully compatible with ModMenu, allowing you to access settings directly from the main menu.

Technical Excellence
Keybind Slots isn't just about convenience; it's about stability. The mod is engineered to handle version transitions smoothly. By storing keybinding data in a structured format, your profiles remain "portable"—meaning you can update your game version without losing your complex configurations.

Native OpenGL Support: Optimized for modern rendering pipelines.

Low Memory Footprint: Minimalist code structure designed by a developer who understands hardware constraints.

Installation
Ensure you have the Fabric Loader installed.

Download the latest .jar from the Versions tab.

Drop the file into your mods folder.

(Recommended) Install ModMenu and Fabric API for the best experience.

Developed with precision by Ekrem Taha.
Take control of your inputs. Master the swap. Rule the arena.
